material.text: dark lutefisk, which cannot be normally observed

insult.text: A pox on you, and your kind!
A few rounds of dice poker, guv?
A winner is me
AAA! AAA! AAA!
Absolute Mover IQ skill? Not in this game, pal
Adventurer detected. Initiating countermeasures.
Aim for the horn
All punches above the belt, please
All right, who left the door open this time?
All right, all stored away! You can count on me, honey
All this unpleasantness could have been avoided
All your eyebrows are belong to us
Am I doing this right?
Another lamb to the slaughter
Another one from the evil eyebrow empire
Anyone got any adventurer spray? The things are all over the place these days
Although I do not receive a paycheck, I consider killing adventurers to be my occupation.
An Eyebrow! Hide the food!
...And three! SMILES GO FOR MILES! HOORAY!
Aren't you a special snowflake?
Aren't you going to scream? You can, y'know, it's all right
Bah, humbug
Beep boop, I am a robot from the future sent back in time to kill you, beep boop
Being a monster is hard but rewarding work
Bitter medicine tastes like yuck
Burning the midnight oil again?
Cake or death?
Capitalism, ho!
...Chocolate? Did you say...chocolate?
Cloudy with a chance of eyebrows, they said...
Come here and let me give you a hug
Come on!
Confound thee, 'tis had better not be one of thy jacknapes again
Could I kill you, please? C'mon, I used the 'please' word, I was very polite.
Damn, you stink!
Damn it, how much mana do you have?
Death approaches
Defeating me? Impossible. That much is absolute
Destroy everything
Did my spirit shine?
Didn't I see you at the union meeting?
Do a barrel roll!
Do you know I'm fond of chess?
Do your worst
Do you mind if I get comfortable? I have a feeling this is going to take a while
Don't bash this one too hard, else it won't cook well
Don't eat the tofu
Don't kill the young and pregnant females, you gotta have a job tomorrow
Don't make me angry. You won't like me when I'm angry.
Don't run, it's just ham!
Don't worry, things are about to get a lot worse
Don't tell the Eyebrow anything! The secret will keep you alive!
Dredmor isn't about why, he's about why not
Drinking won't take away the reality of your situation
Eat your greens, son. They're good for you.
Encyclopedias? Satisfaction guaranteed or your money back!
Enough talk! Have at you!
Ever hear of doing it witcher-striga style?
Everything fades. Come, let us live while we can
E-exploration team! Run!
Exploration? Leave it to me!
Excellent...I've levelled up.
Everyone lies
Everyone! I just finished making dinner!
Everyone will feel the pain of my lutefisk takeaway lunch
Eyebrow-er! Get it off me!
Eyebrows - just say no.
Eyebrahkiin? NO!
Fight! Fight!
Fine weather eh, chap?
Five zorkmids says this one doesn't last ten seconds
Friendly friends!
Fool! If you change the future, we'll all disappear!
Foolish Fool Foolishly Fooling in Folly...
For a better tomorrow
Get a haircut, hippie
Get on with it already
Get out of the gene pool, you're mucking it up
Get out the weapons, let's try the diplomatic approach
Grabbin' pills
Go back to sleep
Go home and be a family person
Go home to your mommy
Good morning! Let's make it a great day!
Gosh, exploring is hard! Yup yup!
Got a smoke, buddy?
Gotta move that gear up
Guten tag
Has anyone seen my moisturiser?
Have you considered the many benefits of owning a complete set of gold-bound encyclopedias?
Have you accepted Arceus as your lord and personal saviour?
Have you no shame?
Help! Help! I'm being oppressed!
Help me out with this...do you taste better garlicky or buttery?
Henshin-a-go-go, baby!
Hey, hey!
Hey, I've got some great sandwiches! Want any?
Hello, there! Welcome to Dredmor assembly!
Hello there, my dear boy!
Hi-yah! I'm a witcher!
Hmm...I knew you were that kind of exploration team
Hmm...where did I put the emergency donuts, now?
Hold still, this will only sting a moment
Holding B doesn't improve your catch rate
How fortuitous. I must usually leave my lair to feed.
Hudda hudda hudda
I can't believe it's not meat
I think some hot sauce will go will with this one
I think I can
I need a drink
I have a cold today
I shall insult thee in ye olde butcherede Englishe
I will hug you and squish you and call you George
I should be getting hazard pay for this
I have a fantastic offer for you
I only use sustainable hero-elimination techniques
I'm going to murder you until you're dead
I majored in philosophy and drama, now look at me
I spit on your filthy compensation plan
I've got to do something about this
I am so awesome, I astound myself
I grow weary of this charade
I so do love vengeance
I don't have to deal with this nonsense, I'm a goddamned NINJA.
I hate you. Go away.
I could kill you in an instant
I just remembered I have something important to do
I would never let my children date you
I hereby demote you to the lowest possible position in academia...a graduate student!
I didn't do it! You can't prove anything!
I CAN'T TAKE THIS ANY MORE! WHERE'S MY MEDICATION?
I will defeat you...WITH NINJA SCIENCE!
I'm done for...
I used to be an relative of a rich guy like you. Then I took a boot to the head.
I WILL STOP YOU UNTIL YOU DON'T SUCCEED!
I rob from the rich and give to the poor
I like turtles
I like them eyebrows. Give them to me.
If killing and eating you is wrong, I don't wanna be right
I don't want to faint in a place like this...
I oughta listened to them when they said I was doing a dead-end degree
I'll gut you like a Cornish game hen
I'm bored
I'm too old for this
I'm late, I'm late!
I'm drunk, what's your excuse?
I'm doing you a favour, really
In you go! Into the cooking - I mean, swap cauldron!
Insult directed at the size of your primary or secondary sexual characteristics
It's a witcher, boys! Hide your women!
I have a recruitment rate of minus twenty four point five percent
I might be unable to go on...
It's got a Doom Seed! Run!
I like pants, they're comfy and easy to wear
IT'S SWELLING AGAIN! MY LEVEL IS SWELLING!
I bought gummis to share, do you want any
I can't go exploring, I'm retired
If we don't bring back any perfect apples, the guildmaster will...will...
I don't see what's so great about Team Charm
I hope you find a sealed chamber and have no keys
It's ok, I got this
It's nice to go exploring
It's a monster house!
It's go time!
It burns! IT BURNS!
Is this some kind of joke?
I've seen better-looking things stuck to my foot
Initialising combat sequence
It concerns me not what enemies await us
It didn't have to come to this
It is a good day to die. Please, join us for this activity.
It's like watching an evisceration chute work
I've got a good feeling about this drink
I will overwhelm your senses and delight your digestive system
If you see Dredmor, tell him I quit
I'm going to waste all your reviver seeds
If you can wake me up, I'll grant you a wish
If you keep being difficult, it will mean big trouble for you!
If we bring this one back it'll definitely cause a stir at the guild
I'll back you up with my Helping Hand move
I'll punch out all your blood
I'll feed your soul to Dredmor himself
I'll take a Dredmor burger, footy fries and a miasma mousse, please.
I'LL BUY YOUR ENCYCLOPEDIAS! JUST STOP BEATING ME!
I'll show you how I can be useful
I've thought about changing the world, but it's hard to be brave
I'm sorry for all the terrible things I said about you
I'm not a monster, I'm a hero management technician.
I'm happy to be exploring with you
I'm just going to lay down right here, go ahead and kill me
I'm ready for work now, getting bored over here already
I'm going to go exploring all over again today!
Immersion? In this game? Hahaha!
Introducing tongs! They can do ANYTHING!
It will only get worse from here
It's rough and tumble time
Jolly good show there
JOOR ZAH FRUL! It isn't working! WHY ISN'T IT WORKING?
Just how many of you are there?
Kek rega burg
Kiss me
Know that I'm very proud of you
Let darkness take you
Let me guess. Someone stole your sweet-I mean, lutefisk.
Let's discover how much xp you're worth
Let's team up and find the golden chamber!
Let's see what this week's born loser has to offer
Let's not drag out the inevitable
Let's keep this strictly professional
Let's help each other do well
Let's take on this challenge nice and steady
Let's work hard to be chosen for the expedition
Logic chess...BEGIN!
Long live the Reaction
Look at that one, its eyes are wide open but it's fast asleep
Looks like we can't quite reach an agreement
Looks like we saved a trip to the grocery store, honey.
Make it die, please
Make sure master loot's on before we down this boss
Mamma mia!
Maybe if I cover my eyes it won't see me
Me gusta
Me love you long time
Mmm. MmmMMMMMmmMM.
Mommy, make the bad person go away!
My dad never went to my spelling bees when I was a kid, and now I'm very bitter
My kid is missing, will you find him?
My life for Dredmor
My loot brings all the eyebrows to the yard
My precious merchandise! Catch that thief!
MY FULL SUPPORT IS BEHIND YOU! HAVE CONFIDENCE!
Ni hao
Nice hat...I mean, eyebrows
No! I will not be defeated here!
No, we have no jobs for a witcher. Have you tried the next dungeon over?
NO ENEMY IS MY EQUAL
No comment
NOOO! WILSOOOON!
No, I'm not going to join your team even if you beat me to a bloody pulp
Not enough rage
Now, play permadeath like a good player, mm?
Now your time is over. You will love me, and nothing else.
Oh, an eyebrow? Good thing I'm indestructible.
Oh boy! It's the feast I take most delight in feasting upon!
Oh my gosh! I'm so embarrassed!
Oh no, my belly's empty
Oh no, what is THAT doing in the house? GET IT OUT! PUT IT OUTSIDE!
Oh no...I guess I'll just put up a note on the job bulletin board
Off with its eyebrows!
One more for the adventure log
Okay...got to remember...do these eyebrows and I have a history?
Okay, I know what this looks like, and I promise you it's not what you think.
Okay, look here. I'm trying to threaten you, but you've got to work with me. Let's start over, okay?
Okay, you go and act like a fool, but I will have no part of this
Oops! I dropped the lift key!
Open range, open fire
Order in the court! Objection overruled!
Ordrak, Ordrak, receive my sacrifice
Our guildmaster is something special, isn't he?
Phat lewt!
Pills here!
Please be gentle
Please give me all of your money
Please, take a seat and we can get started
Please don't spam room-wide moves, I hate that
Please share a drink and allow the flower of conversation to bloom
Positive thinking. Positive...thinking...
Prepare to be served
Propriety? You have no idea what that is
Protect the Time Gear
Part of a winning strategy is knowing when to withdraw
Prepare for trouble, make it double
Quick, help me stuff this pot roast into this candle! Can't let the Eyebrow get to it!
Quit faffing around over there
Really? REALLY?
Remember to get rid of the evidence when we're done with this one
Remember, stand up to the Eyebrow and it'll back down.
Remember, when you're facing an Eyebrow, don't EVER mention F-O-O-D or L-O-O-T, it drives them crazy.
Resistance is futile
Roll for initiative
Run! It's the Eyebrow of Blaviken!
Run! It's the greatest Eyebrow of all!
Running out of character names?
Say your prayers
Screw the rules, I have the RNG
Seekers of the seven treasures! I am-oh, this isn't working.
Shouldn't you have memorised my pattern by now?
Silence! I KEEL you!
So be it! You will all bear witness to my power!
So much for stealth
Some music would be appropriate for this, don't you think?
Sometimes, I dream of cheese
Sorry I'm late, I had a schedule to keep
Sorry, I just can't take you seriously
Soylent blue is monsters
Squish food! Eat food!
Stand still so I can kill you
Stay awhile and listen
Stay classy
Stop screaming and explain calmly what's wrong
Stop spamming that move, it's annoying
Suck gas, evildoer!
Take the red pill
Team Rocket, blast off at the speed of light!
Thank goodness it's Friday.
Thank you for joining us. Perhaps we can swap hero-disposal tips.
That is a fine pair of eyebrows. May I ask how much you paid for them?
The burning you feel? It is shame.
The darkness swells within me
The end is near
The ice doth come
The stick! The stick!
The prey approaches
The only thing that matters is the truth
The only way to truly get rid of one of these is have another eat its soul
The Good...they don't know how close to Evil they really are.
The flavours metal adds to human meat don't clash, instead they blend together in fine harmony in this dish
The unique bitterness of this situation brings out a mature flavour to the play of your life
There is something very wrong with you
They'll have to glue you back together in hell when I'm through with you
They're adventurers, Francis.
This has got to be a joke
This is a harsh world, don't rob me of the few joys I have left
This is my home. Please, stay awhile and make pie.
This is a dungeon, not bloody grand central station.
This isn't Zero Isle, you know
This is...all a nightmare!
This is so overrated.
This had better be important, I'm trying to enjoy my tea
This seems like a very silly thing to do
This wasn't in the script!
This wasn't in my job description
This will hurt me more than it does you
There is no moose level
The Grand Master of All Things Bad doesn't exist, and we definitely aren't his minions!
That's right, I'm a wanted criminal. Do you have what it takes to bring me down?
THIS! IS! DREDMOR!
Those eyebrows of yours are so last-year
Thou art a blight upon this world
Three more gold and I can upgrade my weapon
Thy blood shall soil the land
Time to receive your eternal reward
TOO SOON, EXECUTUS! TOO SOON!
TO THE PIT
Train some more, you must
T'was fine until you showed up
Ugh, my back is killing me
UP AND AT 'EM! IT'S MORNING!
Visiting your old friends at the guild, eh?
Wait, don't do it THAT way! That's thoroughly unsanitary!
Wait...I know you. You're a wanted man.
Waiter, I ordered a low-fat meal
Where next? I'll follow you wherever you go!
Want to pull sentry duty and earn some money?
Whoops, just hit the self-destruct button
Would you like a Gracidea?
Wanted outlaw spotted!
Where's our needlessly complicated mechnical contraption?
We're going to have a lot of fun together
We are looking for the milkman. We don't know where he is.
We are wiping the floor with you.
We all disappear someday, what matters is what we do with our lives
We can fix you
We had a good thing going here, and you ruined it!
We know who's paying you
We need to talk
We should do this more often
Welcome to the cafe of hopes and dreams
Welcome to the Dredmor disco domain
Well, here's your big-win prize
Well, off to visit your mother
What a farce...
...What? How?
What are you playing at?
What tomfoolery is this?
What's the scouter say about its eyebrow level?
When are you leaving?
Where you see death, I see opportunity
Who committed the crime? It's you!
Whoever loses has to wear the yellow scarf, okay?
WHY. GOD. WHY.
Why are you doing this? It sounds like a really really bad idea
Why are you so greedy
Why do I have this sinking feeling
Why so serious?
Why two swords? Does he tend to lose them often?
Why aren't we allowed to evolve?
Why, don't you like fusion cuisine?
Why am I a cat fetus sperm tail?
Why must you destroy everything that is good
Will you still love me after today?
Will you form an exploration team with me?
Will you take me exploring with you?
Where are we going? Gotta make up your mind!
YES! YES!
You may not be sterile, but you'll never breed anyway
You are an affront to good taste
You are my only true love
You are on my list of things to do tonight
You are so incompetent, it's funny to me
You are truly a glutton for punishment
You don't want to die with those things on your head, do you?
You gonna do that, Eyebrow? You're really going to spam that same move over and over again?
You can't keep me from my dreams
You behind the eight ball now, foo
Your head asplode
You spoony bard!
You know what they say, the more the merrier
Your skin-tight costume and plaited eyebrows make me trust you
Your technique is still very good
Your unique bitterness comes together for a mature flavour
You were right, this eyebrow outlaw is probably just an 'E' rank
You've fallen into my trap!
You're a cold-blooded killer, but it takes all kinds to make a world.
You're not helping me here, pal
You didn't imagine I would be impeded by this, did you?
YOU EXPECT ME TO WAIT?
You are my new best friend
You broke my bicycle!
You have a dark, dark soul
You picked a bad time to get lost, friend.
You may dream to be a god...but I will never worship you.
You were good, son, real good. Maybe even the best.
You will be moist and delicious
You wouldn't hit someone wearing glasses, would you?
You'd better not be trying to steal my husband, tramp.
You'll look good as a painting on my wall
You'll never take me alive!
Your brains will make a fine dessert topping
Your Honour, the defense would like to submit the evidence.
Your skillset is bad and you should feel ashamed
Your logical mind cannot contend with an illogical opponent
Your mother uses forks the wrong way
You're getting pudgy about the middle
You're still light-years away from facing Dredmor
You're keeping me from my dinner, this is an outrage
You're killing me! I'm dying as a result!
You're not as great as you think
You're not fit to even be made into a sausage

random.text: A sudden, depressing thought strikes you - there are no washrooms in the dungeon.
Admit it, you're lost again. You ought to have taken that right turn towards Sovengarde earlier on.
Ah, another day at the office begins. Time to get settled in.
All eyebrows are mortal. You are an eyebrow. Therefore, you are mortal. Q.E.D.
Are you getting fatter?
Are you SURE you're really in a dungeon and not merely having a very realistic dream that you're in a dungeon?
Attention! Cleanup in corridor 229!
Attention to all shoppers. B-mart is currently offering a sale on all potions. No refunds.
Dang, you forgot to prepare your witcher's potions. Maybe you can harvest some stuff from the monsters around here...
Did you remember to turn off the gas before leaving the house?
Do remember to go outside sometime.
Dungeon duty's unsavoury, but someone's got to do it.
Dungeons of Dredmor would like to remind you that we are committed to providing you with a safe and efficient workplace. All newarrivals are to report to your nearest DSHA official for re-education.
Five minutes until friendship ends.
Freedom truly is scrumptious, isn't it? Time for you to explore this new concept with delicious passion.
Guess they weren't lying when they said there were jobs for witchers here.
Have you been naughty...or nice?
Have you found any special secret rooms yet?
Hmm...there has to be a delicious pot roast somewhe- no, no, keep focused.
I don't think we're in Kansas anymore, Toto.
It is dark. You are likely to be eaten by a grue.
It's almost tomorrow! You've wasted all your daylight!
If you don't hurry up, you won't be able to get home in time to watch the next 'Digglesons' episode.
If you liked this mod, why not try some other room mods?
Look at that! You had absolutely no idea that was mathematically possible!
Maybe taking this job off the board wasn't the best of ideas.
Maybe you should've brought a bigger Treasure Bag...
Morph Ball ability acquired. Tap down twice to activate Morph Ball.
Ninjas are just a fairy tale. They don't exist, and there's definitely not one behind you right now.
Oh no! Not here! Not now! You're going to be walking funny for months!
Read this and weep.
Really, you'd have gotten away with it if not for those danged kids.
Remember, adventurers. Eat your greens, drink your milk, brush your teeth and stay in Dungeoneering 101 class at 300000 Zorkmids a semester.
Remember, don't drink the water. Dredmor puts stuff in it to make folks forget. You can't even remember how you got here.
Remember, pain is weakness leaving your body.
Sure, Dredmor's decor is a bit off, but what sort of feel would YOU give the place?
The beatings will stop when morale improves.
The groans of drunken diggle frat boys echo through the corridors.
The RNG's on a roll today. Good luck - you'l need it.
The sun rises in the east.
They're probably having dinner back at the guild now.
This feels like the Battle Subway all over again.
This is a reminder that all non-regulation eyebrows are DSHA non-compliant and punitive action will be taken accordingly.
This is it! This is when DESTINY! MEETS! FUNTIME!
This is the dungeon public service system. All monsters are informed that code eyebrow is in effect.
This situation is...less than optimal.
Today is hug-a-newbie day. Please share your hugs posthaste.
Ugh...what did they put in the Sewer Brew last night?
Ugh...you feel dizzy and nauseous a moment.
Wait till the guys back at the guild hear about this!
Warm tingles run through your lower belly.
Well, at least they'll get the insurance if you die in here.
What an amazing adventure this is turning out to be!
Welcome to B-Mart, shopper. Please do not park in the cephalopod parking space if you are not one.
Welcome. Welcome to City Seventeen. It's safer here.
Why does everyone insist on you solving their problems?
Would this all have been better if it'd been in...SPACE?
You are okay with this. In fact, you think this is a good thing.
You can't help but feel great about everything.
You're certainly not getting paid enough for this.
You could go for a nap right about now.
You are what you eat. Now that's a scary thought.
You catch the warm scent of draconic prayer candles in the air.
You wonder how your partner is doing without you.
You feel the tremors of Temporal Tower disintegrating.
You feel ready to evolve any moment now. Good thing there's no one around to see it happen to you.
You have a sudden craving for pickles and sewer brew.
You know, you might be trapped in a very realistic nightmare from which you can never awaken. Isn't that a nice thought?
You really ought to speak to your agent about getting a better role. Maybe a speaking one.
Your random text is new and interesting and I would like to subscribe to your newsletter.
Your skill in destruction has increased to 25. Oops, wrong game.
Your witcher's medallion is vibrating like mad. Well, it's only to be expected.

ichor.text: smashed mechanisms (for it was secretly a robot)
unfinished term papers (speaking of which, I should really go about finishing mine)

title.text: Ace Attorney seeking the truth about
Dancer who pushes a beat to
Reporter staking out a scoop on
Rich Boy who wastes money on
Socialite who tries to chat up

wizardname.text: Sir Wilhelm Buckley Fainshaw the 3rd, esquire, M.D.

wizardtitle.text: , He Whose Name We Do Not Speak (But Certainly Can Write Down)

wizardspiel.text: Can create a rock so heavy he can't lift it.
Dungeons and depths deepened with diligence.
Enjoys romantic dinners and long walks along the beach.
Examining the relationship between health potion use and weight gain.
Happy all the time. ALL. THE. TIME.
Inappropriate but in a good way.
Is in possession of confections of baked flour.
Knows whether you've been naughty or nice.
Lost things found with remarkable speed and accuracy.
May or may not be partially or wholly imaginary.
May or may not be pregnant.
May or may not contain nuts.
Nominated for employee of the month.
Once performed services for Lady Svetlana.
Organiser of the Elf-Dwarf annual get-together potluck.
Papers graded with negotiable leniency and affection.
President of the Plastics Proliferation Party.
Published famous thesis on correlation between wearing red clothing and untimely death.
Pulls pastries and wine out of thin air.
Rejected for tenure from Evil Alchemists University.
Studied aerial trajectories of Minotaur wrestlers.
Undefeated king of the voltaic boogaloo.
Walks the void between the spheres.
Will never threaten to hex you, and in fact, cannot speak.
Will not consider positions that involve teaching.
Will not turn you into a phoenix.

wizardtag.text: A one-stop provider for all your summoning needs.
Alcohol extracted from wizardly containers and remnants.
All elements of Magicka conjured.
All potions handcrafted in a traditional fashion.
All rights reserved.
All services performed subject to the appropriate magical tax.
Buying zinc powder at competitive rates.
Consult your physician before retaining wizardly services.
Details within.
Diggles ensl- tamed at competitive prices.
Discounts available for bulk boiling of ginseng.
Desperately seeking a reliable source of rust in bulk.
Do not ask about the peas.
Do not contract services if pregnant.
Do not disturb during the full moon.
Does not do kingdoms or magic axes.
Enjoys wine with cheese.
Everything available - for a price.
Evisceration chute cleaning performed only on Fridays.
Free samples of our evil enhancement pills available on request.
Has prime tower real estate for sale.
Inquire about our dental rates today.
Last seen at Wonkdonkler's Brewery.
Last seen 'chasing the phoenix'.
Last seen conducting blood alcohol experiment.
Last seen face-down in beer keg.
Last seen in parts unknown.
Last seen in the maw of a monstrosity from the Dungeon Dimensions.
Last seen running from his bar tab.
Last seen saying 'hey, watch this!'
Last seen settling his bar tab.
May or may not contain nuts.
Metal powders tasted for impurities.
Moonlighting for moonshine.
Needs money to support dream dust and ice wine addiction.
Not liable for loss or injury arising directly or indirectly from the use of provided magical services.
One hundred percent dwarf guaranteed or your money back.
Our mortar-and-pestle unit clean and DSHA certified.
Paying top price for the left hands of gnomes caught cheating at cards.
Phoenix down gathering done on the cheap.
Please ask about our senior's discount.
Rates at half-price for royalty.
Residues safely disposed of.
Selling sensitive insider information on Evil Alchemists University.
Sole importer of various controlled substances.
Specialises in swords and stones.
Triangulon's Trial of Triangulation and Trigonometry Tested Tempermentally.
Voltaic cells replaced for a small fee.
Will not reveal identity of secret meatloaf ingredient.
Will take payment in liquified fermented Fairywodger.
